gap: SELECT_CARD/tutor card resolution + context_card_id (~10% of options). Model A resolves fetched/target cards (e.g. Mega Signal 1145, Mega Starmie 1031) where deck_policy_v3.option_card_id returns None, and differs on effect.id context handling.
conclusion: exact-ID conversion is FEASIBLE and ~90% there, but NOT bit-exact -> running the live smoke on it would be a divergent feature pipeline (prohibited).
